---
title: "The Science"
listing:
  - id: gen2-papers
    contents: "gen2/*.qmd"
    sort: "theorems desc"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, categories, description]
  - id: gen1-papers
    contents: "gen1/*.qmd"
    sort: "title"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, categories, description]
---

::: {.lang-zh}
**基于 x² = x + 1 的纯数学研究。每条定理经 Lean 4 机器验证。**
:::

::: {.lang-en}
**Pure mathematics from x² = x + 1. Every theorem machine-verified in Lean 4.**
:::


## Generation 2 --- Pure Mathematics from x² = x + 1

Nine papers submitted to international journals, all derived from the golden-mean shift. Every theorem machine-verified in Lean 4.

:::{#gen2-papers}
:::

---

## Generation 1 --- Quantum Cellular Automata and Foundational Physics

Eight papers exploring emergent physics from information-theoretic first principles.

:::{#gen1-papers}
:::
